full_text:
Yang Ci (Boyu)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Ci, styledBoyu, was born in Hongnong. Warned the Emperor about Zhang Jue, ignored and resigned. A tutor to Emperor Ling. Yang Ci was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Yang Ci lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
